# PHAssetResourceUploadJob.State.pending

**Case**

The job has been registered.

## Declaration

```swift
case pending
```

## States

- **PHAssetResourceUploadJob.State.registered**
- **PHAssetResourceUploadJob.State.succeeded**: The job has failed to send over.
- **PHAssetResourceUploadJob.State.failed**: A request has been made to send the asset resource to the destination, but has not yet been fulfilled.

items.description: The job has failed to send over.
